title: sigillin — P-SIGIL: The poetic-symbolic interface layer of the GenesisAeon stack
description:
The poetic-symbolic interface layer of the GenesisAeon stack: self-referential sigil parser, trilayer validation (YAML/JSON/Markdown), and MandalaMap resonance.

Part of the GenesisAeon ecosystem (P-SIGIL, domain: semantic state anchors / symbolic interface).

See github.com/GenesisAeon/sigillin for source, documentation, and reproducibility notebooks.
